## Description

Describe your change clearly.

## Benefits and context

Why should this change be accepted? Which issue does it solve?

## How has this been tested?

Describe your test setup and exact steps.

## Home Assistant add-on checklist

- [ ] I tested YAML syntax locally or via CI
- [ ] I updated `DOCS.md`, `README.md`, or `CHANGELOG.md` when needed
- [ ] I avoided committing secrets, tokens, camera passwords, or private keys
- [ ] I considered minimal privileges / AppArmor / exposed ports
- [ ] I tested or considered both `amd64` and `aarch64`
